message:
Update glamour table unit tests for minimal border style

The table_spacing_tests were written for the old bordered table style.
Now that we use minimal borders (matching Go glamour), update tests to:
- Check for internal separators (│, ─, ┼) instead of outer borders
- Verify absence of outer corners (╭, ╰)
- Find header separator line instead of top border

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
